name: 熊刀（★） | 森林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
